audit_name: AI_OS Full Project Industry Standard Audit Decision Matrix Draft

entries.correction_needed: Add higher-level documentation index if repo continues expanding.
entries.recommended_action: Create future architecture map and file ownership index.
entries.notes: Repo structure is layered but documentation count is high.

entries.recommended_action: Continue protecting root governance files.
entries.notes: Root governance is protected by policy and validator checks.

entries.recommended_action: Create shared protected-file checker before production writers.
entries.notes: Validators check both unstaged and staged protected diffs.

entries.recommended_action: Maintain DRY_RUN-first workflow.
entries.notes: Separation is consistent across automation and docs.

entries.recommended_action: Design shared validation utility conventions.
entries.notes: Current validators are effective but repetitive.

entries.recommended_action: Continue fixture and schema preparation.
entries.notes: Dashboard has strong planning boundaries.

entries.recommended_action: Keep assistant non-blocking and transparent.
entries.notes: Manual, voice guide, tooltip, persona, and training boundaries exist.

entries.recommended_action: Add schema validation before telemetry persistence.
entries.notes: Telemetry remains preview-only.

entries.recommended_action: Continue preview-only report generator work.
entries.notes: Report writing boundaries are explicit.

entries.correction_needed: Central schema validation should precede APPLY writers.
entries.recommended_action: Create shared writer schema validator before any write.
entries.notes: Writer fixtures, variants, and output schema exist.

entries.recommended_action: Keep Morning Brief preview-only.
entries.notes: Morning Brief has text contract, boundary, preview, and state helpers.

entries.recommended_action: Retain explicit human approval checkpoints.
entries.notes: Approval queue and gate docs exist.

entries.recommended_action: Document Codex, ChatGPT, validator, and human ownership in one index.
entries.notes: AGENTS rules are strong; checkpoint drift should be tracked.

entries.correction_needed: No correction before next planning stage.
entries.recommended_action: Continue no git add/commit/push during APPLY work unless explicitly requested.
entries.notes: Codex workflow uses inspect, create scoped files, validate, summarize.

entries.correction_needed: No correction before future trading review.
entries.recommended_action: Keep trading execution blocked.
entries.notes: Dashboard and Mean Machine remain advisory/visibility-only.

entries.correction_needed: Formal execution architecture remains future work.
entries.recommended_action: Keep UI low-latency goals separate from trade execution paths.
entries.notes: No execution path exists; separation is documented.

entries.recommended_action: Continue prohibiting credentials in fixtures, screenshots, demos, writers, and dashboards.
entries.notes: Credential access remains blocked.

entries.recommended_action: Use fixture-only capture and redaction rules later.
entries.notes: Screenshot and demo boundaries are defined.

entries.correction_needed: Deployment architecture is not yet formalized.
entries.recommended_action: Create future deployment architecture and update strategy docs before production dashboard.
entries.notes: Stack evaluation exists; packaging and release process remain future work.

entries.correction_needed: Add index and reduce duplicated policy text through references.
entries.recommended_action: Create documentation index and policy cross-reference map.
entries.notes: Documentation is comprehensive but high-volume.
